Global.valBranchesDesc: Unmatched coverage ensuring rapid response times wherever you are in Thailand.
Global.valMechanicsDesc: Expert technical support standing by to keep your fleet operational.
Global.valInventoryDesc: Zero downtime. We stock the parts you need, ready to deploy.
Global.valAwardDesc: Proudly awarded by HELI, the #1 forklift manufacturer in China.
Global.valRankDesc: Almost three decades of proven excellence in material handling.

HomePage.heroTitle: The #1 Forklift Distributor & Rental Fleet in Thailand.
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Over 30 years of expertise. 18 branches nationwide. 450+ specialized technicians. Powering the logistics of Thailand's biggest industries.
HomePage.introBody: We are Thailand's premier material handling partner. While we are proud to be top-tier distributors for global brands, our flagship offering is our unrivaled Forklift Rental Program. We don’t just supply machinery; we guarantee uninterrupted productivity. By assuming the total cost and risk of maintenance, breakdowns, and logistics, we allow you to focus entirely on scaling your business.

RentalServices.title: Enterprise Forklift Rental Solutions
RentalServices.subtitle: Zero Downtime. Zero Maintenance Risks. Maximum Flexibility.
RentalServices.intro: Equipment ownership shouldn't be a liability. As our most popular and trusted service, our rental operations support Thailand's largest warehouses, factories, and ports.
RentalServices.longTermDesc: The ultimate predictable OPEX strategy. We supply brand new (red plate) forklifts built to your exact specifications. Protect your cash flow and never worry about depreciation again.
RentalServices.monthlyDesc: Perfect for seasonal spikes in inventory, project-based contracts, or scaling operations dynamically.
RentalServices.dailyDesc: Immediate relief for sudden breakdowns or special events. We dispatch trucks instantly from our 18 branches, with or without a certified operator.
RentalServices.freeMaintDesc: We cover all preventative maintenance, labor, and spare parts. You only pay for fuel/electricity.
RentalServices.replacementsDesc: If a rental breaks down, we immediately dispatch a free loaner truck. Your logistics will not halt.
RentalServices.noHiddenDesc: Transport, servicing, and emergency rapid-response are fully bundled into your competitive rate.

EngineForklifts.title: Engine Forklifts (Diesel, Gas & LPG)
EngineForklifts.subtitle: Unrelenting Power for the Harshest Environments
EngineForklifts.intro: Designed for heavy-duty outdoor applications, construction sites, and lumber yards. Built to handle extreme loads without breaking a sweat.

ElectricForklifts.title: Electric Li-ion Forklifts
ElectricForklifts.subtitle: Clean. Quiet. Uncompromising.
ElectricForklifts.intro: Say goodbye to emissions and massive fuel costs. Our premium lithium-ion forklifts offer zero-maintenance batteries, ultra-fast charging, and zero performance drop-off during long shifts. Ideal for enclosed warehouses, food & beverage, and pharmaceuticals.

WarehouseEquipment.title: Warehouse Equipment
WarehouseEquipment.subtitle: Maximize Your Warehouse Density
WarehouseEquipment.intro: Narrow aisles? High racks? No problem. Our warehouse range (reach trucks, stackers, pallet jacks) is engineered for precision and agility, allowing operators to move inventory safely in the tightest of spaces.

PartsAccessories.title: Forklift Parts & Accessories
PartsAccessories.subtitle: Genuine Parts. Zero Compromise.
PartsAccessories.intro: With an inventory of over 10 million THB, we ensure your downtime is kept to zero. From high-tread solid tires and durable forks to advanced telemetry devices, we supply pure OEM quality.

PreOwned.title: Pre-Owned Inventory
PreOwned.subtitle: Premium Reliability. Exceptional Value.
PreOwned.intro: Every pre-owned forklift undergoes a rigorous 140-point inspection by certified engineers. Red-plate quality performance at a fraction of the capital expenditure.
